free_text: Structure of low-lying states by (a,a') inelastic
Targets were foils about 0.1 mg/cm2 thick, home-made by
evaporating Ge dioxide at 1100 degrees C onto carbon
foils. Targets were enriched isotopically up to 98.84%
For the first 2+ and 3-states statistical accuracy was
10% or better for angles below 40 degrees, 5% or
better for angles from 40 degrees to 110 degrees and
not worse than 10% in maxima and 25% in minima for
angles larger than 110 degrees. For other excited
states statistical accuracy vary strongly from one
Energy resolution was between 100-200 keV FWHM for the
first 2+ and 3- states, but was poorer for higher-
prediction of optical model for elastic scattering at
